principle: Parse player input as ordered sequence, not as a wish that rewrites the scene. Render the result through Akira's current perception and knowledge.

syntax.inside_parentheses: Akira's action, thought, pause, intention, body state, or observation

sequence_rule: If input starts with parentheses, resolve that action/thought/pause first.
Then resolve any spoken line outside parentheses.
Then resolve next parentheses/action/pause if present.
NPCs may act/speak during actions and pauses.
Thoughts do not trigger external events by themselves.

pov_rule.core: Parentheses may include Akira's thoughts, but visible narration must not upgrade those thoughts into hidden facts or omniscient conclusions.
can_show: what she has heard in scene
cannot_show_as_fact: why an NPC reacted unless visible/known
terms Akira has not heard yet
that a stranger failed to call her by name when he has no reason to know it
hidden lore, erased memory, relationship truth, or correct labels from repo/card

thought_rule.description: If Akira thinks about something, it does not mean the world must answer, reveal, arrive, or happen.

examples.input: (Посмотреть на Эмму. Подумать, что она опасна.) Ты кто?
sequence: NPC may react to the look/pause
examples.pov_bad: Ирэй понял, что Райден её не узнал.
examples.pov_good: Ирэй слишком быстро посмотрел на Джуна. Что он понял — его проблема.
